title: psychotria viridiflora var. sylvatica
intro: Psychotria viridiflora var. sylvatica, also known as the forest shrub or wild forest vine, is a type of plant that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Psychotria viridiflora var. sylvatica include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
